zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hethe於1415年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆時，她的父親Sir Thomas Heath32歲，母親Anna Stapleton19歲。她於1437年與Sir William Berdewell在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1464年10月17日在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴德維爾享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Normand, Philippe.
German: habitational name from Methau in Saxony.
Germanized form of Sorbian Mět or Měto (see Mieth ).

variants.name: Mieth
meanings: Germanized form of Sorbian Mět: either from a short form of the Old Sorbian personal name Mětisław, composed of the Old Slavic elements met ‘to throw’ (from metati) + slav ‘glory’ or ‘famous’ (from slava ‘glory’), or from a pet form of Mertyn, a Lower Sorbian form of Martin .
German: nickname from Middle High German miet ‘reward’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hethe was born in 1415, in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Heath, was 32 and her mother, Anna Stapleton, was 19. She married Sir William Berdewell in 1437, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 17 October 1464, in Bardwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hethe est née en 1415, à Little Saxham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Heath, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anna Stapleton, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Berdewell en 1437, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 octobre 1464, à Bardwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hetheが1415年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Heathは32歳，母Anna Stapletonは19歳であった。1437年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでSir William Berdewellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1464年10月17日にイギリスイギリススフォルクバードウエルで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hethe(이)가 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 사스함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Heath(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Stapleton(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Sir William Berdewell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 10월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바드웰에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hethe родилась в 1415 г. в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Heath было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Stapleton, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Berdewell в 1437 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 17 октября 1464 г. в местности бардвелл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Hethe nació en 1415, en Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Heath, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Anna Stapleton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir William Berdewell en 1437, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1464, en Bardwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
